author: y4rr
content:
Plan: Add conformance tests in conformance_vision_models.rs for UNet (#867). 

Tests to add:
1. unet_output_shape_contract — input [B,3,H,W] with H,W div by 16 → output [B,num_classes,H,W]. Test multiple sizes (32x32, 64x64, 16x16) and classes.
2. unet_forward_backward_gradient_finite — loss.backward() + verify grads not NaN/Inf.
3. unet_gradient_nonzero_on_params — at least one param.grad has nonzero elements (verifies all params connected to graph).
4. unet_snapshot — fixed-seed deterministic output comparison against a pre-computed hash.

Remove cascade_skip from create_feature_extractor_smoke (#880 guard replaced by actual integration test).

Strategy: UNet has no torchvision reference so tests are self-referential (output shape formula + forward-backward stability). Snapshot uses parameter initialization seed via fixed random state.
